description: Baseline: 31 tests passing, all features working
Feature: source removal (removeSource, removeAllSources) with context menu and 3 new tests
Feature: natural language → SQL query flow with Thinking... indicator, CSV support, and 8 new tests

Fix CSV/TSV DataSource.from(url:), fix keyword ordering in planners (summarize before show, schema before looksLikeSQL). Add /clear, /sources, /copy commands. Add column listing and top-N patterns for parquet/CSV. 20 new tests.
Feature: JSON/JSONL/NDJSON source support with full planner, conversation search, import error handling. 19 new tests (42 planner + 30 viewmodel).
Feature: /rerun command for re-executing previous queries, DuckDB adapter tests for CSV/JSON, SQL extraction tests. 10 new tests (101 total).

Feature: /history command, /sql no-args guidance, DuckDB show views/indexes/version patterns, duplicate source prevention, settings management tests, path escaping, empty prompt edge cases. 24 new tests (125 total).

Comprehensive test coverage: TranscriptModels Codable round-trips, AppSettings/ProviderKind properties, DuckDB binary locator edge cases, raw argument parser edge cases, ProviderDiagnostics detection, MetalWorkspaceVisualization for JSON/CSV/idle/clamping. 43 new tests (168 total).

Feature: /export transcript to clipboard, /status workspace summary. PromptLibrary tests, MetalWorkspaceSnapshot Codable tests, AppSessionStore edge cases (corrupt file, nested dirs, overwrite). 20 new tests (188 total).
Feature: DuckDB 'describe [tablename]' pattern, random sampling (USING SAMPLE) for parquet/CSV/JSON. SidebarDestination tests, DuckDB describe target extraction tests. 11 new tests (199 total).
MetalDeviceCapabilities tests (badges, equality, nil device), MetalWorkspaceVisualization provider variance test. 6 new tests (205 total).

ProviderChatService error path tests (CLI unavailable, missing API key, process failure), generateSQL integration test, error description/equality tests. DuckDB SQL passthrough tests (SELECT, WITH, PRAGMA), command precedence tests. 12 new tests (217 total).

Feature: /version command. ViewModel edge case tests (empty prompt, composer clear, trigger prompt, focus request, source count in Metal snapshot, diagnostics drawer). KeychainStore error tests. 12 new tests (229 total).
DuckDB memory usage, installed extensions, and settings patterns. DataSource fileSizeDescription computed property, DataSource Codable round-trip test. 6 new tests (235 total).
Feature: batch import (importSources) with duplicate/unsupported file handling. Provider status lookup test, empty raw command test. 6 new tests (241 total).

DataSourceKind computed properties (readFunction, displayLabel, fileExtensions). Transcript role filtering and command count. Gemini response parsing and model argument tests. DuckDB CLI error description/equality tests. 10 new tests (251 total).
Feature: /bookmark and /bookmarks commands with BookmarkedCommand model, duplicate prevention, persistence via AppSettings. 9 new tests (260 total).

Parquet metadata/parquet_schema patterns, extended looksLikeSQL with EXPLAIN/CREATE/COPY/SUMMARIZE. DuckDB EXPLAIN/SUMMARIZE/COPY passthrough tests. ProviderKind extended property tests. 10 new tests (270 total).
Feature: /undo command to remove last user message and responses. ProviderPreference default tests. 6 new tests (276 total).

Source sorting (by name, by date), user/system message count properties. DuckDB raw parser edge cases (adjacent quotes, tabs, newlines, multiple spaces). Execution request metadata tests. 9 new tests (285 total).
Count pattern tests for all source types, natural language fallback tests for complex queries across all source types, provider prompt tests without source. 12 new tests (297 total).
PromptChip model tests, TranscriptRole raw value tests. 3 new tests reaching 300 total milestone.
Feature: /stats command showing session statistics (messages, commands, sources, bookmarks). 2 new tests (302 total).
Feature: /stats command. Metal snapshot destination/failure/duration tests, setup flow CLI auth mode test, initial transcript test. 7 new tests (307 total).
Claude model argument tests (with/without model), generateSQL for parquet source test. 3 new tests (310 total).
TranscriptRole Codable round-trip, DuckDBCommandPlan equality, MetalExecutionState/Destination raw values, AppSettings bookmark serialization. 7 new tests (317 total).
Error path tests: DuckDB unavailable for commands/raw/NL queries, provider error handling, failing responder test. 4 new tests (321 total).
Feature: CommandRegistry with tab-completion (completions for prefix), query cancellation state (cancelRunningCommand, isCancelled), QueryTemplate model for saved queries. 21 new tests (342 total).
Feature: transcript item pinning (togglePin, pinnedItems), /info command for source details. TranscriptItem.isPinned with Codable support. 9 new tests (351 total).
Feature: DuckDB 'preview [tablename]' pattern, source grouping by kind, command preview/result filtering. 7 new tests (358 total).
Feature: /pins command to view pinned transcript items, /pinned alias. 5 new tests (363 total).

Feature: /reset command (clear sources, bookmarks, templates, transcript). DuckDB 'count [tablename]' pattern with extractCountTarget. CommandRegistry completeness and uniqueness tests. 12 new tests (375 total).
Feature: AppAppearance (system/light/dark), DataSource.fileExists/isReadable validation, removeMissingSources cleanup, transcriptSummary computed property. 11 new tests (386 total).
Feature: DuckDB 'sample [tablename]' pattern with extractSampleTarget, recentSources(limit:), sessionDuration, lastSuccessfulOutput. 9 new tests (395 total).
Source kind check properties (hasDatabaseSource, hasFileSource, sourceKindCount), appearance persistence test, session duration test. 6 new tests (401 total).
Feature: DuckDB 'summarize [tablename]' pattern, transcript pagination (transcriptPage/transcriptPageCount). 8 new tests (409 total).
Feature: source search by name (findSources), deduplicated command history (uniqueCommandHistory). 4 new tests (413 total).
Feature: session export as JSON (exportSessionAsJSON) with round-trip validation. 2 new tests (415 total).
Feature: DataSource.duckDBReadExpression computed property for generating DuckDB read function calls with path escaping. 5 new tests (420 total).
Integration tests: raw DuckDB command execution, /sql command with source, /sql without source guidance, multi-step import/remove workflow. 4 new tests (424 total).
SQL generation CLI unavailable error test, extractSQL with no/multiple code blocks tests. 3 new tests (427 total).
MetalWorkspaceVisualization edge case tests: transcripts/setup destinations, large output, source density scaling. 4 new tests (431 total).

Comprehensive planner edge case tests: guidance without source, fields/columns patterns for all source types, DuckDB database info/list tables/list columns/row counts patterns. 10 new tests (441 total).

AppSessionStore persistence tests for all transcript kinds, bookmarks/templates, pinned items. DuckDB execution request/result equality, error descriptions, binary locator tests. 9 new tests (450 total).
Feature: transcript item tagging (addTag/removeTag/allTags/withTag), source aliases (setSourceAlias with displayName override), compact transcript mode. 18 new tests (468 total).
Feature: MarkdownDetector utility (containsSQLBlock, extractFirstCodeBlock, codeBlockCount), DataSource fileExtension/directoryName properties. 10 new tests (478 total).
Feature: /tags command, DataSource query builders (selectQuery/countQuery), tag view in ViewModel. 10 new tests (488 total).
